labels.notes: Joanne Louise Takacs 2:47pm — visit was BLOOD DRAW for upcoming PRP, NO injection performed today (P-section explicit: 'No injection performed today; blood work required prior to treatment'). Patient has Rheumatoid Arthritis with chronic pain post-PRP-stop, dental dryness from Lyrica. DEFECTS: (1) Class B/C dx 707 (Decubitus ulcer / bed sore) WILDLY WRONG. ROOT CAUSE: tools-model returned 726 (fibromyalgia), v0.10.67 semantic guard rejected (`fibromyalgia` ∉ `chronic pain post-PRP RA`), Stage-2 fell through to match_diagnosis_text which hit the BUGGY `chronic wound → decubitus ulcer bed sore` abbreviation expansion in diagnostic_codes.rs:676 plus `prp → skin subcutaneous` at line 675 — both wrong and steered toward 707. Expected dx 714 (RA). (2) Class H K037A (fibromyalgia care) INAPPROPRIATELY ADDED — patient has RA, NOT fibromyalgia. The condition_keyword_guard doesn't cover FibromyalgiaCare. Billing A007A correct. User-flagged question: A007A+K037A combo billable together is plausible per OHIP but K037 should not be billed without fibromyalgia diagnosis evidence.
